name: Doberge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff and set aside.
2. Cream butter, shortening, and sugar with an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs yolks one at a time.
4. Alternately add milk and water with flour until completely mixed.
5. Fold in beaten egg whites and vanilla.
6. Bake in 4 (8-inch) pans at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
7. Cool the cakes.
- Split each layer, making sure to place them in the freezer for a short time before cutting if necessary.
8. Spread filling between layers:
- Melt chocolate.
- Combine flour and sugar in a separate saucepan.
- Add milk to the flour mixture and cook until thickened.
- Stir a little of this mixture into beaten eggs to prevent them from cooking, then return the egg mixture to the pan and cook until very thick.
- Add melted chocolate and stir well.
9. Cool before spreading on cake layers.
10. Melt butter and chocolate on low temperature.
11. Blend in sugar and water and heat until smooth.
12. Frost the top and sides of the cake.
